llm_plan.reasoning_summary: This plan optimizes the itinerary by fixing repeated attractions and ensuring meal compatibility and slot coverage.

days.notes: Day 1 includes the outbound flight. Breakfast, morning attraction, and lunch are scheduled. Afternoon attraction is chosen due to the early arrival time.
Day 2 is a full non-travel day with breakfast, morning attraction, lunch, afternoon attraction, and dinner.
Day 3 includes the return flight. Breakfast, morning attraction, and lunch are scheduled. Afternoon attraction is chosen to fit the remaining time before the return flight.
